title: Verticality
body:
![magic happens!](https://github.com/KessokuTeaTime/Verticality/blob/artwork/content/v1/magic.png?raw=true) # Verticality **Verticality** verticals your hotbar. Simple enough? Fascinating enough! To toggle the feature, just press Escape to access the game menu, then you'shall see arrows on the hotbar area. Click them to see what happens! ## Hotbar Styles **Verticality** provides the following hotbar styles:

Horizontal (Vanilla)
Vertical

Horizontal
Alternative Layout
Vertical
Alternative Layout

Also works in Spectator Mode.
## Compatibility **Verticality** has good compatibility with: - **[Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised)** - **[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)** Feel free to [open a new issue](https://github.com/KessokuTeaTime/Verticality/issues/new/choose) if you find an incompatibility. ## User Interface [This video](https://github.com/KessokuTeaTime/Verticality/assets/68179735/097af445-4613-49a4-a2fc-ca3b9c4ca0b4) demonstrates how you can play around with **Verticality.**
